title: 关守神
description:
👉 Click "Visit Website" on the right sidebar or join our Discord to learn more about the game! →👉 Click "Visit Website" on the right sidebar or join our Discord to learn more about the game! →👉 Click "Visit Website" on the right sidebar or join our Discord to learn more about the game! →

Guardian of the Sacred Seal  is an otome visual novel promoted with the tagline:

"Unconditionally loved by a yandere young man."

In the otherworldly Gokurakudou, a young girl teams up with a mysterious young man to take on seemingly ordinary requests that gradually reveal unexpected twists.

With every choice you make, the relationships between the characters begin to change, and the hidden truth behind this world slowly comes to light.

As the story unfolds, you'll constantly make choices throughout everyday life and various incidents.

Your decisions affect the relationships between characters, their thoughts, and their motivations, leading the story toward different endings.

• Story-driven Adventure / Visual Novel

• Everyday life and mysterious incidents in an otherworldly setting

• Includes all chapters of Guardian of the Sacred Seal ~Encore~

• New Yoichi After Story – Tsukiumi Route

• 20 different endings

• 79 event CGs (excluding variations)

Note: This game requires manual saving.

Voice Cast• Yoichi — CV: Yusei Nogi

• Tsukiumi & Ryuji — CV: Yuris Prince

• Saku — CV: Tatsuta Kamio

• Shopkeeper & White Rabbit — CV: Setsugekka

• Tobiume — CV: Yuki Tachibana

•
description_short: "Guardian of the Sacred Seal" is a story-driven adventure game centered on the concept: “To be unconditionally loved by a yandere young man.” In the otherworldly paradise of Gokurakudō, a young girl partners with a mysterious man to handle seemingly ordinary requests that hide deeper secrets.
